name: JSON Schema Form
description: The model emits a JSON UI tree validated against a fixed Zod schema, rendered by the client's own design system — never raw HTML.
whenToUse: Reach for Declarative GenUI when you need more shape variety than a static catalog but still want a hard validation boundary and full control over the rendered DOM/design system. Good fit for forms, settings panels, and structured data-entry surfaces.
previewPrompts: Build a form to collect a customer's shipping address.
Build a signup form with name, email, and a plan selector.
Build a feedback form with a rating field and a comments field.
